body: You can get Carer Support Payment if you work. Your 'take home pay' cannot be more than £204 a week. This is about the same as £884 a month, or £10,608 a year.
citation_label: mygov.scot Carer Support Payment: if you work
heading: Carer Support Payment: If you work
legal_identifier: mygov.scot Carer Support Payment: if you work
